title: revision_front_matter
description: Schema for the YAML front-matter at the top of a revision file at <spec-root>/history/vNNN/proposed_changes/<topic>-revision.md. Per PROPOSAL §'Revision file format' lines 3027-3050.

proposal.description: Filename of the paired proposed-change file (e.g., 'foo.md'). Pairs by stem with revision-to-proposed-change-pairing.

revised_at.description: Decision timestamp in UTC ISO-8601 seconds.

author_human.description: Human author from `git config --get user.name` and `user.email`, or 'unknown' fallback per io/git.get_git_user.

author_llm.description: Resolved LLM author per the unified precedence: --author CLI → LIVESPEC_AUTHOR_LLM env → payload field → 'unknown-llm' fallback. May also be a livespec-<tool> reserved value for skill-auto artifacts.
